svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="研发全流程脚本化" id="pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-104" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="360" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="研发流程的每一环,都已脚本化 / MCP 化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="1140" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="需求 / PRD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="测试" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="270" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="文档" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="480" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="部署 / 发布" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="690" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="P5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="线上运维" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="900" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PE1" edge="1" parent="1" source="P1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PE2" edge="1" parent="1" source="P2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PE3" edge="1" parent="1" source="P3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PE4" edge="1" parent="1" source="P4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="P5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AI 出 PRD 草稿
+ 自治评审回路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="60" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="给函数签名
AI 产用例 + 过契约闸" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="270" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="AI 写代码同时
产出架构 / API 文档" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="480" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="贴合项目的部署 + 回滚
健康检查脚本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="690" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="事故即规范
规则沉淀成可执行脚本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="900" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ME1" edge="1" parent="1" source="P1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="M1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ME2" edge="1" parent="1" source="P2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="M2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ME3" edge="1" parent="1" source="P3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="M3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ME4" edge="1" parent="1" source="P4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="M4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ME5" edge="1" parent="1" source="P5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="M5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CONC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="判断:全流程无「只能人肉做」的环节 —— 凡是重复、依赖规则、对账式的事,都能让 AI 落成脚本或 MCP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1000" x="60" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
